commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=450946f250e5f8921197cbb99ece5d62b356e832)
commands.review_summary:
The PR promotes standalone serialized text tool-call blocks into structured `toolCall` content in the embedded runner and expands shared XMLish/plain-text tool-call parsing plus provider buffering coverage.

PR surface: Source +697, Tests +690. Total +1387 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source: current main enforces a cumulative XMLish payload cap, while the PR branch only enforces per-parameter size. The original leak is supported by the related merged Discord scrubber and this PR's tests, but no live harness reproduction was provided.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof, and the patch needs a small parser-cap fix before maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: fix: promote serialized tool calls in harness
target.body:
## Summary

- Promotes standalone serialized text tool calls in the embedded runner into structured `toolCall` blocks so they execute through the normal tool lifecycle instead of leaking into chat.
- Extends the shared plaintext tool-call parser/buffer handling for XML parameter payloads, case/alias matching, interleaved partials, cancellation, terminal errors, and whitespace-sensitive arguments.
- Keeps provider compat buffering aligned so provider wrappers do not stream raw serialized tool text before final conversion.

## Verification

- `/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts` - 4 files, 71 tests passed
- `/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tool-policy-shared.ts src/agents/tool-policy.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.ts src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts && git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: standalone serialized tool-call text is converted to structured tool calls at the harness layer and withheld from streamed chat surfaces while pending.
Real environment tested: local macOS worktree on Node 24.14.0, PR branch based on current upstream/main.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest, core/test tsgo probes, oxfmt check, and diff whitespace check listed above.
Evidence after fix: tests cover XML parameter promotion, provider buffering, alias/case handling, interleaved partial scrubbing, iterator close, terminal error ordering, Unicode close-tag offsets, and whitespace-preserving argument extraction.
Observed result after fix: all local focused verification passed.
What was not tested: Crabbox live smoke is pending and will be posted after this PR is created.

Refs #86924
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
